description_long: This is a dark, wooden bench-style chaise with a high, slightly curved backrest and solid side panels. The seat and backrest are constructed from a single, continuous piece of wood, giving it a sturdy and monolithic appearance. Both armrests are flat, slightly protruding, and finished in a darker brown tone, contrasting subtly with the rest of the structure. The rear panel features a small, simple cross detail, suggesting a possible ecclesiastical or memorial function. The legs are integrated into the side panels, providing stability and a traditional silhouette. The surface has a matte, slightly weathered texture, indicating durability for outdoor or public urban use.
description: A dark wooden bench-style chaise with a high backrest, flat armrests, and a small cross detail on the rear panel. The surface is matte and slightly weathered, giving it a sturdy, traditional look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the high, continuous backrest, wide seat, and both flat armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the solid side panel, armrest, and the thickness of the seat and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full back panel with a small cross detail at the center.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the side panel and armrest profile.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is tall, slightly curved, and constructed from a single solid piece of wood, with a smooth surface and a small cross detail on the rear. It is unsegmented and lacks decorative tufting or buttons.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both sides, flat and slightly protruding, finished in a darker brown tone.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are integrated into the solid side panels, straight and robust, with no visible decorative elements, matching the overall dark wood finish.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: There is no visible upholstery; the surface is solid wood with a matte, slightly weathered texture.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: No cushions are present; the seat and backrest are formed from continuous wood panels with no additional padding or layering.
